resources.string: Advanced Media Scraper with Cloudflare Bypass
Welcome to Web Scraper! Advanced media downloader with Cloudflare bypass, gallery viewer, and multi-threaded downloads.
Install Termux from F-Droid, then run pkg install python and pip install required packages.
Run the scraper with python Duke2_Enhanced.py and follow the interactive prompts to configure your download.
Configure media types, crawl depth, proxy settings, and bypass engine for your specific needs.
Choose from Images, Videos, Audio, Documents, Archives, eBooks, or all types combined.
Results are displayed in an interactive HTML gallery organized by media type with search and filter options.
Three bypass engines available: curl_cffi (TLS impersonation), cloudscraper (JS solver), or standard requests.
Configure HTTP, SOCKS5, or rotating proxies to avoid rate limiting and IP bans.
Use session persistence for authenticated sites, enable lazy-load extraction, and leverage multi-threading for faster downloads.
Common issues: permissions (termux-setup-storage), rate limiting (use proxy), or missing files (check /sdcard/Download/Duke2/).
